title: Odisha: Youth Dies While Filming Reel In Odisha’s Salandi River
description: According to police, two youths — identified as Himanshu Sekhar Nayak and Mithun Nayak — leapt into the river while a companion filmed the act. While Himanshu managed to swim back to safety, Mithun was swept away by the strong current. His body was recovered more than two hours later following an extensive search by fire service personnel
